name: goal-fw-go2w desktop (Humble)
postCreateCommand:
bash -c 'source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && rosdep update --rosdistro humble && apt-get update -q && rosdep install --from-paths humble_ws/src --ignore-src -r -y --rosdistro humble && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && printf "
[goal-fw-go2w] goal-fw-go2w desktop (Humble) setup finished.

"'
